experiment: Exp D - KVBM v2 conditional disagg end-to-end, 2x H100-80GB, Qwen/Qwen3-8B BF16
note: Working ISL range for KVBM conditional disagg on ryan/kvbm-rdma-pull is <=12 tokens (1 KV block threshold). ISL>=24 tokens triggers the hung disagg path due to deferred v2 Rust scheduler in v2/mod.rs. This benchmark runs at max working ISL (12 tokens). DYN_KVBM_CPU_CACHE_GB=40 env var required for NIXL UCX initialization.
